response.original_title: ချစ်မီးလျှံထဲက မေချို
response.overview: Since childhood, three close friends have shared a deep bond and struggled together through life. They are Kyaw Thu, who dreams of becoming a successful businessman; Htun Htun Naing, who aspires to become a police officer; and Khine Khin Oo, the girl whom both men deeply love.  The three of them are willing to make great sacrifices for one another. Although both Kyaw Thu and Htun Htun Naing have feelings for Khine Khin Oo, their friendship, mutual consideration, and circumstances force them to struggle between love and loyalty.  As they pursue different dreams and face the many twists and turns of life, their future becomes uncertain — who will finally be able to walk alongside whom? In the end, the story portrays the heartbreaking journey of a woman named “May Cho,” whose life is shaped by a love filled with sacrifices of heart, life, and honor.
response.title: May Cho in the Fire of Love
